subject: Coordination brief: persian activities around Melbourne | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-2013
body: Following yesterday's call, the persian effort in Melbourne needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla seems to disagree with Frida Kahlo on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-2013. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
